body.summary: The user, Deepesh Adhor, called to reschedule an existing dental appointment from Wednesday at 4 PM to Friday, June 26th at 4 PM. The agent successfully rescheduled the appointment and confirmed the new date and time with the user.
body.transcript:
bot:Thanks for calling BrightSmile Dental, this is Jessica. How can I help you today — are you looking to book an appointment, or do you have a question about our services?
human:I already booked appointment for Wednesday, four PM, but I want to reschedule it because I won't be able to make it. 
bot:Got it. Let me help you reschedule. Can you confirm your full name so I can locate your appointment?
human:My name is Deepesh Adhor. 
bot:Thanks, Deepesh. Let me check — you mentioned your appointment was for Wednesday at 4 PM. What day and time would work better for you?
human:I can come in Friday same time. 
bot:Alright, let me check. We have Friday, June 26th, at 4 PM available. Should I go ahead and reschedule your appointment to that time?
human:Yeah. Sure. 
bot:Perfect, your appointment is now rescheduled for Friday, June 26th, at 4 PM. You'll get a confirmation via text or email shortly. Anything else I can help you with?
human:No. Thank you. 
bot:You're welcome, Deepesh! Have a great
